title: quantile() and median() commands crash when used 2x on the same variable on a null table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table ( id Int32, value Float64, description String ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, NULL, 'first'), (2, NULL, 'second'), (3, 1.5, 'third');
CREATE TABLE another_table ( ref_id Int32, score Float64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 2.5), (3, NULL);
SELECT quantile(0.25)(value), quantile(0.5)(value) FROM test_table WHERE id > 3;
key_bug_features: quantile() and median() on null table
